creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your patch does not apply.  Please try to submit patches directly against the FreeBSD ports collection, ideally in git-format-patch format.  The patch you submitted has something weird going on with an a/librewolf.orig directory vs. a a/librewolf directory.  To prepare a correct patch:

 1. clone the ports collection and checkout the main branch
 2. apply your changes
 3. make a commit with the changes
 4. execute "git format-patch" to produce a patch
